2:45 PM POTENTIAL JURORS ASSEMBLED IN DEPT 3. CLERK TAKES ROLL CALL. ALL POTENTIAL JURORS PRESENT. JURORS SWORN PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY PAYS HALF DAY REPORTERS FEES--FEE TAG 2021P120. DEFENSE HAS WAIVER OF JURY AND RPTR FEES SIGNED BY COURT. 2:55 PM COURT CONVENES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK CALLS TWELVE POTENTIAL JURORS TO BOX. JURORS GIVE IDENTIFYING IN- FORMATION. JUDGE VOIR DIRES JURORS. 3:30 PM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENSE ATTORNEYS VOIR DIRE POTENTIAL JURORS. 4:00 PM BOTH SIDES EXERCISE PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES. 4:30PM JURORS CHOSEN AND SWORN. 4:35PM ALTERNATE JUROR CHOSEN AND SWORN. COURT RECESSES UNTIL DECEMBER 22, L993 AT 9 AM. JURORS ADMONISHED.
